class.name: AudioStreamPlaybackPolyphonic
class.description: Playback component of [AudioStreamPolyphonic]. After setting the [code]stream[/code] property of an audio stream player and playing it, the playback instance can be obtained by calling the [method AudioStreamPlayer.get_stream_playback], [method AudioStreamPlayer2D.get_stream_playback], or [method AudioStreamPlayer3D.get_stream_playback] methods.

method.name: is_stream_playing
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the stream associated with the given integer ID is still playing. Check [method play_stream] for information on when this ID becomes invalid.

method.name: play_stream
method.description: Plays an [AudioStream] at a given offset (in seconds), volume (in decibels), pitch scale, playback type, and bus. Playback starts immediately. The return value is a unique integer ID that is associated to this playback stream and which can be used to control it. This ID becomes invalid when the stream ends and does not loop, when the [AudioStreamPlaybackPolyphonic] is stopped, or when [method stop_stream] is called. This function returns [constant INVALID_ID] if the number of streams currently playing is greater than [member AudioStreamPolyphonic.polyphony]. If you need a higher number of maximum polyphony, raise this value. [b]Note:[/b] [param bus] only works for [AudioSamplePlayback] types.

method.name: set_stream_pitch_scale
method.description: Changes the stream's pitch scale. The [param stream] argument is an integer ID returned by [method play_stream].

method.name: set_stream_volume
method.description: Changes the stream's volume, in decibels. The [param stream] argument is an integer ID returned by [method play_stream]. [b]Tip:[/b] You can convert linear value to decibels using [method @GlobalScope.linear_to_db].

method.name: stop_stream
method.description: Stops the stream. The [param stream] argument is an integer ID returned by [method play_stream], which becomes invalid after calling this function.

constants.constant: Returned by [method play_stream] in case the given stream is null, [member AudioStreamPolyphonic.polyphony] equals [code]0[/code], or when attempting to play more streams than allowed by [member AudioStreamPolyphonic.polyphony].
